The table shows the changes in the value of a toy on a website over a period of three weeks. During which week does the value of the toy change the most?

\begin{tabular}{|c|c|c|c|}
\hline
\textbf{Week} & 1 & 2 & 3 \\
\hline
\textbf{Change (dollars)} & $-1.50$ & $2.50$ & $-0.75$ \\
\hline
\end{tabular}

a. \quad Week 1

b. \quad Week 2

c. \quad Week 3
